jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Rivigo
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Rivigo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Varanasi-based team.

About Rivigo:
Rivigo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo!
